assumptions: The intragroup dividend gives rise to a foreign-currency-denominated monetary receivable and corresponding payable within the group.
The question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements under IFRS 9.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies a fair value hedge as a hedge of the exposure to changes in fair value of a recognised asset or liability attributable to a particular risk.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies a cash flow hedge as a hedge of variability in cash flows of a recognised item or a forecast transaction, and separately addresses qualifying intragroup foreign currency items in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes the net investment hedge model as a distinct foreign currency hedge accounting approach in consolidated financial statements.
